Name: ぎょうざのみっちー 中央駅店
Note: Kagoshima-Chuo Stn (2 min). Order the iron-plate gyoza set; cash only, opens 17:00.

Name: Kagoshima Furusato Yataimura Area Li-Ka
Note: Kagoshima-Chuo Stn (3 min). 25 yatai under one roof — perfect for the group; arrive by 18:00 to claim seats.

Name: Kagoshima Furusato Yataimura BUSCHIKA
Note: Kagoshima-Chuo Stn (3 min). Kurobuta shabu stall — Brady safe (no egg); ask for soy-based dashi for Cody/JJ.

Name: Solaria Nishitetsu Hotel Kagoshima
Note: Tenmonkan-dori tram (1 min). Booked. Top-floor onsen w/ Sakurajima view.

Name: Kissaten Niki Niki
Note: Tenmonkan-dori tram (3 min). 1970s kissaten — siphon coffee + thick cream-soda; opens 8am, perfect pre-Sakurajima warmup. (Hidden gem · Kissaten)
